creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yasuhiro Kimura from comment #0)

Thanks for the report.

Could you share the backtrace from `emacs --debug-init` ? And also could you try with $HOME/.emacs symlinking to an empty file, and see if that generates a warnning too. Essentially, I'm trying to do an equivalent of "emacs -q".

Thanks!
